title: AFI Composition Ref v1 (FACTORY-CONTRACT — canonical graph/composition provenance stamp)
description: The canonical composition provenance stamp (afi.composition-ref.v1): the COMPLETE, hash-pinned identity of the composition that produced one scored signal — pipeline identity + canonical manifest hash, analyst-config hash, scorer plugin identity, the hash of the bound plugin-manifest set, the hash of the deterministic execution summary, and the hash of the enrichment bundle. Every field is REQUIRED and every hash is a CanonicalHash v1 ($ref ../provenance/v1/canonical-hash.schema.json): a v2 evidence record either carries the full composition provenance or does not exist. This realizes the reconciliation report's §9 N1 'canonical graph provenance' item as a dedicated referenced object (avoiding N5's strategyVersion overloading).
$comment: BOUNDARY (FACTORY-CONTRACT): schema/contract only — NO hashing code, NO execution-summary format (the summary object itself is an operational artifact; ONLY its canonical hash is protocol material here, and it MUST be timestamp-free per District-2 hash doctrine). Hash computation follows schemas/hashing/canonical-json-hashing.v1.md; expected domain tags per field are recorded in the property descriptions and verified by tooling, not by this schema (CanonicalHash's domainTag registry is CH-O2 OPEN).
x-afiDoctrineRefs: afi-governance/decisions/factory-configurable-pipelines-v1 — authorizes the canonical V1 contract family, including this composition provenance object and afi.scored-signal-evidence.v2 which requires it

reports/afi-configurable-dag-live-runtime-reconciliation.md §9 N1/N5 — canonical graph provenance on the evidence record requires a new schema version + decision; a dedicated composition object avoids binding composition-versioning semantics to strategyVersion
afi-governance/decisions/persistence-v0.1.md (MONGO-GOV) D-MONGO-9 — replay/verify sufficiency: the composition pins let a verifier reconstruct WHAT composed the score, deterministically
District 2 hash doctrine — volatile processing timestamps are not canonical hash material; the execution summary hashed here MUST be timestamp-free

x-afiConstraints.allOrNothing: Every property is REQUIRED and additionalProperties is false: partial composition provenance is inadmissible. A submitter that cannot produce every pin MUST refuse to submit (fail closed) — there is no degraded stamp.
x-afiConstraints.hashDomains: TOOLING-VERIFIED expected domain tags: manifestHash afi.factory.pipeline-manifest; analystConfigHash afi.factory.analyst-config; pluginSetHash afi.factory.plugin-set; executionSummaryHash afi.reactor.execution-summary; enrichmentHash afi.d2.enrichment-bundle (the SAME domain the provenance-record's optional enrichmentHash uses). Domain-tag registry remains CH-O2 OPEN; these are the governed expectations for this object.
x-afiConstraints.agreementWithConfig: CROSS-ARTIFACT (tooling-enforced): pipelineId/pipelineVersion/manifestHash and scorerPluginId/scorerPluginVersion MUST equal the resolved analyst-strategy-config's pipelineRef and scorerRef; analystConfigHash MUST equal the registration's analystConfigHash. A divergence is a composition-integrity failure (refuse to submit).
x-afiConstraints.timestampFreeSummary: The execution summary hashed by executionSummaryHash MUST be timestamp-free and deterministic given the same run inputs (District 2 hash doctrine): node set executed, per-node plugin identities, degradation markers, join order-independence marker — never wall-clock durations.

schema.description: Schema-id version of the composition ref.

pipelineId.description: pipelineId of the afi.pipeline.v1 manifest that composed this score.

pipelineVersion.description: pipelineVersion of that manifest (WITH v prefix, matching the pipeline contract).

manifestHash.description: CanonicalHash v1 of the executed pipeline manifest (domain tag afi.factory.pipeline-manifest; description/metadata excluded per canonical-json-hashing.v1).

analystConfigHash.description: CanonicalHash v1 of the resolved afi.analyst-strategy-config.v1 (domain tag afi.factory.analyst-config; metadata excluded). MUST equal the registration's analystConfigHash.

scorerPluginId.description: pluginId of the scorer plugin that produced the score (the pipeline's single scorer node binding).

scorerPluginVersion.description: pluginVersion of that scorer plugin (semver, no v prefix).

pluginSetHash.description: CanonicalHash v1 over the canonically ordered set of ALL bound afi.analysis-plugin.v1 manifests of the executed composition (domain tag afi.factory.plugin-set; per-manifest description/metadata excluded).

executionSummaryHash.description: CanonicalHash v1 of the deterministic, TIMESTAMP-FREE execution summary of this run (domain tag afi.reactor.execution-summary): nodes executed, degradations, join determinism marker (x-afiConstraints.timestampFreeSummary).

enrichmentHash.description: CanonicalHash v1 of the enrichment bundle this run produced (domain tag afi.d2.enrichment-bundle — the SAME domain as the provenance-record's optional enrichmentHash, made mandatory at the composition layer).
